If you’re a business owner in Patna looking to get a website built or improve your Google rankings, choosing the right agency matters a lot. A bad agency wastes your money. A good one brings you real clients.
Here’s an honest comparison of the top web development companies currently operating in Patna, Bihar.
1. Wixwave — Best for SEO-Ready Websites
Wixwave is a website development and digital marketing company based in Patna and Gurgaon. What makes them stand out is that they build websites with Google rankings in mind from day one — not just good design. They handle web development, local SEO, mobile app development, branding, and paid advertising for local businesses across Bihar and Haryana.
Best for: Local businesses wanting a website that actually ranks on Google
Website: https://wixwave.co
Location: Patna, Bihar & Gurgaon, Haryana
